snapshot.description: Acceptance criteria: store OAuth tokens after callback completes. Given a successful OAuth redirect, when the callback endpoint is hit, then tokens are persisted securely.

rejectFeedback: Add migration plan for token storage schema

snapshot.summary: Expose health endpoint for deployment probes
snapshot.description: Acceptance criteria: GET /health returns 200 with service version and database connectivity.

snapshot.summary: Fix login redirect loop on Safari
snapshot.description: Users on Safari bounce between /login and /dashboard after SSO. Acceptance criteria: successful login lands on dashboard once.

snapshot.summary: Add GitLab pipeline badge to README
snapshot.description: Acceptance criteria: README shows main branch pipeline status badge linked to GitLab.

snapshot.summary: Migrate user preferences to Postgres JSONB
snapshot.description: Acceptance criteria: preferences read/write via API; migration script backfills existing Redis keys.
Acceptance criteria: Prometheus metrics for readiness queue depth and gate approval latency.
Acceptance criteria: rotate TLS certificates for staging cluster.
